info.title: Cambrian API
info.description: Stage 1 backend foundation for Cambrian (auth + catalog)

post.summary: Purge all test/non-admin data from the database

parameters.name: mood
parameters.description: Filter by mood (e.g. happy, dark, chill, energetic)

parameters.name: tempo
parameters.description: Filter by tempo (slow, medium, fast) or BPM range (e.g. 120-140)

parameters.name: instrumental
parameters.description: Filter to instrumental-only tracks (true) or vocal tracks (false)

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Filter by duration bucket (short=<2min, medium=2-5min, long=>5min)

CoverArt.description: Optional cover art image (JPEG, PNG, WebP; max 10 MB).

get.summary: Returns a download URL for a purchased track

filename.description: Suggested filename for saving the download

get.summary: Streams the raw audio file bytes for a purchased track

parameters.name: streamId
parameters.description: The stream session ID to stop

get.description: Validates consistency of purchases, library entries, licensing, payouts, and invoices.

get.summary: List all license certificates owned by the current user
Retrieve a license certificate by its ID
Stream audio file for a track
Download a license certificate as a PDF file
Admin: get event counts by type
Check if a feature flag is enabled for current user

put.summary: Admin: create or update a feature flag

licenseType.description: License type: standard, non-exclusive, exclusive, or copyright_buyout

usageType.description: Optional intended usage for the purchased license
Optional intended usage for the purchased license

stripeSessionId.description: Stripe checkout session ID. Required to verify payment was completed.

ApiResponseOfAuthSession.description: Standard API response envelope wrapping AuthSession data.

ApiResponseOfMessage.description: Standard API response envelope for message-only responses.

UsageType.description: Intended usage context for a licensed track

creatorId.description: User ID of the track creator

allowedUses.description: Specific permitted uses (null = unrestricted for license tier)

copyrightOwner.description: User ID of the copyright owner (buyer for copyright_buyout, creator otherwise)

creatorId.description: User ID of the track creator

Bearer.description: Paste a JWT token here. Format: Bearer {token}
